lessons.title: The Constitution — Structure and Supremacy
lessons.description: Bunreacht na hÉireann is the fundamental law of the Irish State.

lessons.title: Constitutional Interpretation
lessons.description: The Irish courts have developed four main approaches to constitutional interpretation: literal or textual interpretation; historical or originalist interpretation; natural law interpretation; and the harmonious or living document interpretation.

lessons.title: The Separation of Powers
lessons.description: We examine the formal mechanism for altering Bunreacht na hÉireann, and the important body of case law on whether substantive limits exist on what may be amended.
